apps.name: Provenance EMU
apps.subtitle: Multi-emulator frontend for iOS & tvOS
apps.localizedDescription: Multi-emulator frontend, supporting various Atari, Bandai, NEC, Nintendo, Sega, SNK and Sony console systems.

privacy.name: LocalNetwork
privacy.usageDescription: Provenance uses the local network to find and communicate with AltServer.

privacy.name: PhotoLibrary
privacy.usageDescription: Provenance can set custom artworks from your photos or save screenshots to the Photo Library.

privacy.name: Bluetooth
privacy.usageDescription: Provenance uses Bluetooth to support game controllers.

privacy.name: Microphone
privacy.usageDescription: Provenance uses the microphone for systems that support audio input (eg. Famicom).

privacy.name: Motion
privacy.usageDescription: Provenance uses your device's accelerometer and gyroscope to emulate portable consoles' built-in sensors.

versions.localizedDescription:
What's New in 3.3.0

This is a big one. Four months of work since 3.2.1 covering iCloud sync, a completely revamped tvOS interface, video filters, and a ton of core and stability fixes.

☁️ iCloud / CloudKit Sync
- ROMs, save states, BIOS files, and artwork now sync across devices via iCloud
- Real-time download progress indicators when loading cloud save states
- Auto BIOS sync on game load when available in iCloud
- ROM metadata syncs alongside files
- Artwork syncs after library updates
- ...

: https://github.com/Provenance-Emu/Provenance/compare/3.2.0...3.2.1

Bug fixes:

- iPad skins fixed
- Joystick in default skin fixed in landscape
- Atari Lynx Retroach controls fixed
- RetroAchievements login fixed
- Skin selection and import UIs fixed
- Skin rotation issues fixed
- Skin previews fixed

Release 3.2.0

We're excited to announce Provenance 3.2.0, a major update focused on performance, skins, and quality of life improvements. This release brings highly requested features and fixes that make Provenance faster and more enjoyable than ever.

🎨 Skins: Now Free for Everyone!

The biggest news:  We believe everyone should enjoy customizing their gaming experience. However, if you love what we're building, please consider supporting the project through  or .

What's New with Skins

- ...

What's Changed
 Check if app group container is readable by @dnicolson in https://github.com/Provenance-Emu/Provenance/pull/2420
 Replace “Wifi” with “Wi-Fi” by @dnicolson in https://github.com/Provenance-Emu/Provenance/pull/2427
 Fix search bar position by @dnicolson in https://github.com/Provenance-Emu/Provenance/pull/2430


: https://github.com/Provenance-Emu/Provenance/compare/3.1.0...3.1.1

What's Changed
 Fix custom textures option 3ds (forgot to bridge to CitraWrapper.mm) by @yippeeeyay in https://github.com/Provenance-Emu/Provenance/pull/2398
 Update PVMetalViewController.swift - Fix Rotation misalignment. by @mrjschulte in https://github.com/Provenance-Emu/Provenance/pull/2400
 Update megaTron.metal by @mrjschulte in https://github.com/Provenance-Emu/Provenance/pull/2402
 Update PVMetalViewController.swift - fix ulTron by @mrjschulte in https://github.com/Provenance-Emu/Prov...
